description: A vivid portrait of a female ballet dancer merged with the form of a dying swan. The woman's upper body is partially nude, her eyes closed in an expression of serene surrender. A white swan's neck and head curve gracefully above and behind her, while large feathered wings — rendered in turquoise and white — enfold her from behind. Small white feathers drift around her hands. The background is a rich, textured turquoise-blue with dark bare tree branches, creating a dreamlike atmosphere. The painting captures the fusion of human and avian forms in a moment of ethereal transformation.
